name: Maison Cloud Sectional Sofa
description: Cream L-shaped sectional with chaise, layered pillows, and a soft modern silhouette—built for spacious Lagos living rooms.

name: Aurelia Cream Tufted Armchair
description: Button-tufted cream velvet armchair with curved arms and classic turned legs—an elegant reading chair.

name: Solstice Mustard Velvet Armchair
description: Statement mustard-yellow velvet armchair with slim black legs. Pairs beautifully with a media console and brass floor lamp.

name: Noir Gallery Sideboard Credenza
description: Gold-framed sideboard with cane doors, styled as a living-room media and bar console under a round mirror.

name: Harbour Grey Tufted Sofa
description: Button-tufted grey three-seater sofa with throw pillows—cosy everyday luxury for family lounges.

name: Atelier Solid Wood Side Table
description: Sculptural solid-wood side table with open shelves for books and décor—perfect beside a sofa or bed.

name: Sovereign King Bedroom Suite
description: King bed with tall tufted headboard, paired nightstands, and bench—hotel-suite polish for master bedrooms.

name: Nocturne Channel Upholstered Bed
description: Plush light-grey channel-upholstered bed on gold feet, shown with matching nightstands and modern brass chandelier.

name: Luna City Guest Bed
description: Comfortable hotel-style guest bed with padded headboard and wood nightstand—ideal for guest rooms and apartments.

name: Atelier Round Bedside Table
description: Minimal round white bedside table with tapered wood legs—clean Scandinavian styling for any bedroom.

name: Hermitage Oak Wardrobe Armoire
description: Full-height mid-century oak wardrobe with double doors and lower drawers—true closet storage without built-ins.

name: Velvet Belle Bedroom Lounge Chair
description: Soft accent lounge chair for the foot of the bed or a dressing corner—shown here in rich mustard velvet.

name: Apex Pro Gaming Desk Setup
description: Full gaming station with dual monitors, RGB PC, and performance chair—ready for marathon sessions.

name: Executive Swivel Lounge Chair
description: Fabric swivel lounge chair on a wood star base—boardroom waiting corners and private offices.

name: Studio Focus Study Desk
description: Clean white study desk with monitor setup and grey task chair—focused work from home.

name: Command Warm Work Desk
description: Warm wood work desk styled for evening productivity—laptop-ready surface with soft lamp light.

name: Aero Swivel Office Chair
description: Lightweight modern office chair with full swivel—all-day seating for hot climates and long workdays.

name: Director Shell Lounge Chair
description: Sculptural white lounge chair with bentwood frame—mid-century calm for offices and reading corners.

name: Imperial Emerald Dining Set
description: White dining table with six emerald velvet chairs and gold legs—formal dinners for six to eight.

name: Heritage Oak Dining Set
description: Solid walnut dining table with grey upholstered chairs under a crystal bar chandelier—everyday family luxury.

name: Compact White Dining Table Set
description: Round white dining table with two modern chairs—perfect for apartments and intimate meals for two to four.

name: Palazzo Solid Wood Dining Table
description: Statement solid-wood dining table that seats a crowd—pair with your preferred chair style.

name: Couture Heritage Dining Chair
description: Classic carved wood dining armchair with warm honey finish—order pairs to complete a traditional suite.

name: Gallery Gold Sideboard Credenza
description: Gold cane-front sideboard with round wall mirror styling—dining storage that doubles as a bar console.

name: Persia Royal Heritage Rug
description: Ornate Persian-style rug in ivory and gold with hand-finished fringe—anchors formal living rooms.

name: Nordic Line Living Rug
description: Soft light-toned area rug under a modern sectional—clean Scandinavian layering for open living spaces.

name: Anatolia Pattern Runner Look
description: Traditional patterned rug with heirloom character—use as a runner look in halls or full-size in living rooms.

name: Cloud Soft Area Rug
description: Soft light area rug styled under a contemporary sofa—barefoot comfort for lounges and bedrooms.

name: Terrace Indoor-Outdoor Look Rug
description: Neutral textured rug that works from living rooms to covered terraces—durable everyday style.

name: Silk Route Gallery Rug
description: Fine gallery rug with jewel-tone heritage patterning—collector finish for statement furniture.

name: Celeste Multi-Globe Chandelier
description: Modern multi-globe chandelier in brass and white glass—shown over a formal dining table.

name: Arc Industrial Floor Lamp
description: Matte grey industrial floor lamp with adjustable head—reading light for sofas and desks.

name: Lumen White Pendant Light
description: Clean white dome pendant over dining tables and kitchen islands—simple modern ambient light.

name: Orbital Rattan-Look Pendant
description: Woven rattan-style pendant that casts warm patterned light—shown in a plant-filled bedroom setting.

name: Linear Brass Wall Sconce Pair
description: Brass wall lights flanking a headboard—gallery-level ambient light for bedrooms and hallways.

name: Studio Grey Pendant Lamp
description: Industrial grey pendant with open bulb glow—minimal lighting for dining nooks and work tables.

name: Heritage Floral Oil Art Print
description: Museum-quality floral still-life print—instant classic art for lounges, stairs, and formal halls.

name: Horizon Minimal Wall Clock
description: Clean round wall clock with silent sweep hands—quiet luxury for living rooms and offices.

name: Bloom Floor Vase with Pampas
description: Tall glass floor vase styled with dried pampas beside a modular sofa—sculptural floral décor.

name: Gallery Console Décor Styling Set
description: Designer console vignette with sculptural objects, plants, and accents—ready-made styling for a living room wall.

name: Venetian Round Wall Mirror
description: Large round wall mirror above a designer sideboard—expands light and space in entryways and living rooms.

name: Silk Luxe Pillow Ensemble
description: Layered luxury pillows in linen and solid tones on a timber headboard—instant bed styling set.

name: Noir Glass Candle Vessel
description: Lit glass candle vessel on soft fur—evening ambience for consoles, nightstands, and bathtubs.

name: Amber Accent Lounge Chair Look
description: Warm orange accent chair styling within a full living-room vignette—inspiration piece for bold seating moments.

name: Heirloom Soft Accent Pillows
description: Decorative pillow set for sofas and beds—mix stripes and solids for playful luxury corners.

name: Amber Glass Statement Vase
description: Amber-tinted glass vase that glows in afternoon light—long stems, branches, or standing alone as sculpture.
